title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs South Asia Partners:
Just Herbs South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs South Asia Partners!
